title: Model Search Response
description: JSON record carrying remote-model search results with detected architecture per result.
documentation:
## Purpose
Output record for `cap:op=search-models`. Carries the result list plus pagination cursors. Each model entry carries both the HuggingFace pipeline tag (`model_type`) and the structural architecture (`model_arch`) — the latter is the field used for cap compatibility checks.

## When to use
Consumed by model-picker UIs to render search results and drive pagination.

has_more.description: Whether additional pages of results exist.

next_cursor.description: Cursor for fetching the next page (if any).

previous_cursor.description: Cursor for fetching the previous page (if any).
